name: @logicn/ext-bridge-quantum
description: LogicN governed bridge for IBM ffsim — out-of-process fermionic quantum simulation under contract, Tower audit lifecycle + attestation
note: Phase 1 = governance core + out-of-process driver + env-absent stub. Phase 2 = real subprocess + OS sandbox. ffsim source (Apache-2.0): C:/wwwprojects/IBM-FFSIM/ffsim. ffsim's Rust stays in ffsim — never linked into LogicN core (charter: No-Rust-in-core).
